name: Proof or case request
about: Propose a bounded public case, synthetic training case, or proof-pack improvement

labels: proof, enhancement

---

## Request type

- bounded public case
- synthetic training case
- proof-pack template
- issue-pack / handoff improvement

## What should be added or improved

Describe the missing proof or case surface.

## Boundary notes

State clearly whether the material is:

- public fact
- bounded rollout record
- synthetic training artifact
- internal-only and not publishable

## Why it matters

Explain the operator, client, or AI-agent use case.
